name: Spright Carrot
name_jp: スプライト・キャロット
desc: If you control a Level/Link 2 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Spright Carrot" once per turn this way. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Level/Rank/Link 2 monster; negate that effect, then if you Tributed a Rank/Link 2 monster to activate this effect, you can destroy that card. You can only use this effect of "Spright Carrot" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Level/Link 2 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Spright Carrot" once per turn this way. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Level/Rank/Link 2 monster; negate that effect, then if you Tributed a Rank/Link 2 monster to activate this effect, you can destroy that card. You can only use this effect of "Spright Carrot" once per turn.
eff: If you control a Level/Link 2 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Spright Carrot" once per turn this way. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Level/Rank/Link 2 monster; negate that effect, then if you Tributed a Rank/Link 2 monster to activate this effect, you can destroy that card. You can only use this effect of "Spright Carrot" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Tactical-Try Deck: Evil★Twin the Kaito Pair

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
misc: Requires control of specific Link Rating
